issues.description: Action type should be 'GiveDon' not 'AttachDon'. 'AttachDon' is for attaching DON cards to other cards; 'GiveDon' is for giving rested DON cards to Leader or Characters. Card text says 'Give up to 1 rested DON!! card' which indicates transfer of ownership, not attachment.

Missing condition 'Always' to represent the 'Once Per Turn' restriction on the activation. The DSL should include a condition to enforce the once-per-turn limit if that is tracked separately, or this should be implicit in the Activated trigger with turn tracking.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Give up to 1 rested DON!! card to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.
